00828|     tokenAddresses: string[],
00829|     chainId: number
00830|   ): Promise<Map<string, TokenRisk>> => {
00831|     const result = new Map<string, TokenRisk>()
00832|     if (tokenAddresses.length === 0) return result
00833| 
00834|     const BATCH = 50
00835|     for (let i = 0; i < tokenAddresses.length; i += BATCH) {
00836|       const batch = tokenAddresses.slice(i, i + BATCH)
00837|       try {
00838|         const res = await fetch(
00839|           `https://api.gopluslabs.io/api/v1/token_security/${chainId}?contract_addresses=${batch.join(',')}`,
00840|           { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(8000) }
00841|         )
00842|         if (!res.ok) continue
00843|         const data = await res.json()
00844|         if (data.code !== 1 || !data.result) continue
00845| 
00846|         for (const [addr, info] of Object.entries(data.result as Record<string, Record<string, string>>)) {
00847|           const flags: string[] = []
00848|           let riskLevel: TokenRisk['riskLevel'] = 'safe'
00849| 
00850|           const isHoneypot = info.is_honeypot === '1'
00851|           const isOpenSource = info.is_open_source === '1'
00852|           const isProxy = info.is_proxy === '1'
00853|           const canTakeBackOwnership = info.can_take_back_ownership === '1'
00854|           const ownerChangeBalance = info.owner_change_balance === '1'
00855|           const hiddenOwner = info.hidden_owner === '1'
00856|           const selfDestruct = info.selfdestruct === '1'
00857|           const externalCall = info.external_call === '1'
00858|           const buyTax = parseFloat(info.buy_tax || '0')
00859|           const sellTax = parseFloat(info.sell_tax || '0')
00860|           const isBlacklisted = info.is_blacklisted === '1'
00861|           const isWhitelisted = info.is_whitelisted === '1'
00862|           const transferPausable = info.transfer_pausable === '1'
00863|           const isMintable = info.is_mintable === '1'
00864|           const honeypotWithSameCreator = info.honeypot_with_same_creator === '1'
00865| 
00866|           if (isHoneypot) { flags.push('Honeypot'); riskLevel = 'high' }
00867|           if (hiddenOwner) { flags.push('Hidden owner'); riskLevel = 'high' }
00868|           if (canTakeBackOwnership) { flags.push('Owner can reclaim'); riskLevel = 'high' }
00869|           if (selfDestruct) { flags.push('Self-destruct'); riskLevel = 'high' }
00870|           if (honeypotWithSameCreator) { flags.push('Creator made honeypots'); riskLevel = 'high' }
00871|           if (ownerChangeBalance) { flags.push('Owner can change balance'); if (riskLevel === 'safe') riskLevel = 'medium' }
00872|           if (transferPausable) { flags.push('Transfers pausable'); if (riskLevel === 'safe') riskLevel = 'medium' }
00873|           if (isMintable) { flags.push('Mintable'); if (riskLevel === 'safe') riskLevel = 'low' }
00874|           if (!isOpenSource) { flags.push('Unverified contract'); if (riskLevel === 'safe') riskLevel = 'low' }
00875|           if (sellTax > 10) { flags.push(`Sell tax ${sellTax}%`); if (riskLevel === 'safe') riskLevel = 'medium' }
00876|           else if (sellTax > 5) { flags.push(`Sell tax ${sellTax}%`); if (riskLevel === 'safe') riskLevel = 'low' }
00877|           if (buyTax > 10) { flags.push(`Buy tax ${buyTax}%`); if (riskLevel === 'safe') riskLevel = 'medium' }
00878| 
00879|           const isSpam = riskLevel === 'high' || isHoneypot
00880| 
00881|           result.set(addr.toLowerCase(), { isSpam, isHoneypot, riskLevel, flags })
00882|         }

00885|       }
